protocols.Paper_title: Clinical-grade Oncolytic Adenovirus Purification using Polysorbate 20 as an Alternative for Cell Lysis
protocols.Evidence: “Two detergents were evaluated for cell lysis, Triton X-100 and Polysorbate 20… The digestion proceeded… at 37°C… Clarification… filters were previously washed…”

protocols.Paper_title: Clinical-grade Oncolytic Adenovirus Purification using Polysorbate 20 as an Alternative for Cell Lysis
Detergent_products_unresolved_for_lysis: High Pure Viral Nucleic Acid Kit
protocols.Evidence: “viral genomes were then extracted using High Pure Viral Nucleic Acid Kit… The viral genome copies were quantified by qPCR”

protocols.Paper_title: Clinical-grade Oncolytic Adenovirus Purification using Polysorbate 20 as an Alternative for Cell Lysis
protocols.Evidence: “two different detergents for cell lysis - Triton X-100 and Polysorbate 20… Total viral particles (TP) recovery was determined by qPCR.”

protocols.Paper_title: Clinical-grade Oncolytic Adenovirus Purification using Polysorbate 20 as an Alternative for Cell Lysis
protocols.Evidence: “The scale-up process was performed with Polysorbate 20 as cell lysis agent… an UHPLC quantification was assessed for the final process sample.”
